rules.power points: At character creation, an adept receives Power Points equal to Magic Rating and spends those points to buy adept powers.
rules.rating limit: The maximum number of levels in a power is normally equal to the adept's Magic Rating, or a lower limit specifically listed by that power.
rules.activated: An activated power must be activated before it has any effect. Its activation cost is listed in the power description.
rules.intrinsic: A power with no listed activation cost is intrinsic. The adept does not need to take an action to gain its benefit.
rules.adept drain: Some adept powers cause Drain. Unless a power says otherwise, adept-power Drain is Stun and is resisted with Body + Willpower.
rules.per level: The listed Power Point cost is paid for each level purchased. The general maximum is the adept's Magic Rating unless the power lists a lower or different limit.
rules.fixed cost: The power has a fixed Power Point cost rather than a cost paid per level.
rules.variable cost: The power uses a special cost progression rather than a single fixed or per-level Power Point cost.

relatedRules.astral perception: While astrally perceiving, an Awakened character becomes dual-natured and can interact with astral objects, including through combat. Astral perception is distracting during mundane tasks, imposing a –2 dice pool penalty to actions on the physical plane. Interpreting an aura uses a Simple Assensing + Intuition [Astral] Test.

adrenaline boost.description:
This power lets you accomplish more in one Combat Turn.
  • You gain +2 Initiative Score per level for the current Combat Turn.
  • At the beginning of the next turn after using Adrenaline Boost, you take Drain equal to the number of levels you have in the power.

astral perception.description: This power bridges the physical and astral realms, allowing you to perceive the astral plane. While using astral perception you are dual-natured, so you can attack astral forms. Follow the normal rules for astral perception.

attribute boost (attribute).description:
Purchase Attribute Boost separately for a specific Physical Attribute: Agility, Body, Reaction, or Strength. It cannot be purchased for a Mental or Special Attribute.

Activation test
Roll Magic + Attribute Boost Rating.
  • Each hit increases the chosen Attribute by 1, up to its augmented maximum.
  • The increase affects dice pools, but does not change Physical limit or Initiative ratings.
  • The boost lasts for twice the hits scored in Combat Turns.
  • When the boost ends, take Drain equal to the power's level.

combat sense.description:
Combat Sense gives you an instinctive awareness of nearby threats.
  • Gain +1 die per level on Defense Tests against ranged and melee attacks.
  • You are always allowed a Perception Test before a possible surprise situation, gaining the benefit of being alerted when that test succeeds.

critical strike (skill).description:
Choose one specific melee skill when purchasing this power: Unarmed Combat, Clubs, Blades, Astral Combat, or a particular Exotic Melee Weapon skill.
  • Increase the Damage Value of attacks made with that selected skill by 1.
  • Critical Strike is compatible with weapons and other adept powers.
  • The power may be selected multiple times, choosing a different melee skill each time.

danger sense.description: You are instinctively sensitive to your surroundings and to impending threats that may not be immediately visible. Gain +1 die per level on Surprise Tests.

enhanced perception.description: This power sharpens all of your senses. Add +1 die per level to all Perception Tests and Assensing Tests.

enhanced accuracy (skill).description:
Choose a Combat Skill when purchasing this power. When using that skill, add 1 to the Accuracy of the weapon you are using.
  • This power cannot be used with Unarmed Combat.
  • It may be purchased multiple times, choosing a different skill each time.

improved ability (skill).maximum: Lower of Magic Rating or skill rating × 1.5 (round up)
improved ability (skill).description:
This power increases the Rating of a specific Combat, Physical, Social, Technical, or Vehicle skill by 1 per level.
  • You must already know the chosen skill.
  • The power cannot be purchased for skill groups.
  • The maximum improvement is your current skill rating × 1.5, rounded up.

improved physical attribute.maximum: Magic Rating; cannot exceed augmented maximum
improved physical attribute.description: Increase one Physical Attribute—Body, Agility, Reaction, or Strength—by 1 per level. This is an augmentation, so your Physical limit may also increase. The power can raise the Attribute above its natural maximum, up to its augmented maximum.

improved potential (limit).description: Choose one inherent limit—Physical, Mental, or Social—when purchasing this power. The selected limit increases by 1 per level. The power may be bought multiple times, once per inherent limit.

improved reflexes.description:
This power increases the speed at which you react.
  • Each level grants +1 Reaction, which also affects Initiative.
  • Each level grants +1D6 Initiative Die, to a maximum of 5D6.
  • The maximum rating is 3.
  • The increase cannot be combined with other technological or magical increases to Initiative.
Power Point cost by level
  • Level 1: 1.5 PP
  • Level 2: 2.5 PP
  • Level 3: 3.5 PP

improved sense.description:
This power gives you sensory improvements not normally possessed by your metatype. It can reproduce a sensory enhancement available through cyberware or bioware unless that enhancement grants bonus dice to Perception Tests, requires wireless operation, or both.

The Core Rulebook also lists these adept-only choices:
  • Direction Sense: +2 dice to Navigation tests while travelling. With a Perception + Intuition (2) Test, determine the direction you are facing and whether you are above or below mean sea level.
  • Improved Tactile: +2 dice to tactile Perception Tests; your fingers can detect extremely subtle surface imperfections.
  • Perfect Pitch: With a Perception + Intuition (2) Test, recognise a musical tone from sound or vibration frequency.
  • Human Scale: With a Perception + Intuition (2) Test, determine the weight of an object down to the gram when you can lift or carry it.

killing hands.description:
This power lets you inflict lethal damage with unarmed attacks.
  • When dealing unarmed damage, choose whether it is Stun or Physical.
  • Killing Hands can be combined with other adept powers that increase unarmed damage.
  • Your Killing Hands attacks are magical, allowing them to bypass magical defences against attack such as Immunity to Normal Weapons.
  • An adept using Astral Perception may use Killing Hands during astral combat.

kinesics.description: Kinesics grants precise control over your nonverbal and subconscious communication, including facial expressions, body movement, eye movement, heart rate, blood pressure, and sweat glands. Gain +1 die per level to resist Social Tests and tests that attempt to read your emotions or truthfulness, including Judge Intentions, assensing, and truthfulness tests.

light body.description:
Light Body lets you make extraordinary jumps and reduces the danger of falling.
  • Add the power's level to Agility before calculating maximum jump distance.
  • Add +1 die per level to your Gymnastics Test when jumping.
  • When calculating falling damage, reduce the effective fall distance by the power's level in metres.

missile parry.description:
You can catch slow-moving projectiles such as arrows, thrown knives, grenades, or shuriken.
  • Add +1 die per level to your defense pool against the attacker's ranged attack test.
  • If you generate net hits, you catch the missile out of the air.
  • You must have at least one empty hand to use this power.

mystic armor.description:
For every level, this power grants 1 point of Armor.
  • It is cumulative with other armor.
  • It does not add to encumbrance.
  • It also protects against damage taken in astral combat.

natural immunity.description: Add +1 die per level to tests made to resist toxins and disease.

pain resistance.description:
Pain Resistance lets you ignore the effects of injury without removing the damage itself.
  • For each level, wound modifiers on both the Physical and Stun Condition Monitors begin one box later.
  • Each level also adds +2 dice to tests made to withstand suffering from pain, torture, magic, illness, and similar effects.

rapid healing.description:
You recover from damage more quickly.
  • Add +1 die per level to Body for Healing Tests.
  • Add +1 die per level to any magical or mundane test made to heal you, whether the attempt is made by you or another character.

spell resistance.description: Add +1 die per level to Resistance Tests against spells, spell rituals, alchemical preparations, and the Innate Spell critter power. It does not apply against other critter powers and does not interfere with spells that you choose not to resist.

traceless walk.description:
You can move over surfaces such as snow, sand, or thin paper without leaving visible traces.
  • You make no noise through contact with the floor, though your movement may still create other sounds.
  • Hearing-based Perception Tests to detect you suffer a –4 dice pool penalty.
  • You do not trigger ground-vibration or pressure sensors.
  • You cannot walk on liquid surfaces, though you can walk across deep snow without sinking.
  • Tracking by non-visual cues such as scent remains possible, but those Track Tests suffer a –2 dice pool penalty.

voice control.description:
You gain extraordinary control over your voice's pitch, modulation, tone, and volume. You can mask your voice and imitate sounds within normal metahuman vocal range, including the voices of others.

Imitating a voice
Make an Opposed Test using Impersonation + Charisma [Mental] against either:
  • a voice recognition system's Rating × 2, or
  • a listener's Perception + Intuition.
Add the level of Voice Control as a bonus to your dice pool.

You also gain +1 Social limit per level.

wall running.description:
You can run up sheer walls or other vertical surfaces for a limited distance.

Test
Roll Running + Strength [Magic]. Hits determine how many metres you may climb in that Action Phase.
  • Longer vertical climbs require steps, ledges, or another place to stop before activating the power again.
  • To run across a vertical surface, combine this power with a Sprint action.
  • At the end of your movement you fall away from the wall, whether or not you reached the intended distance.
